title_de: Rechnerbasierter Reglerentwurf (ersetzt Hybride Discrete Event Systems)
description_en: Teaches computer-aided design and real-time implementation of robust control systems using Matlab/Simulink and modern synthesis methods.
competencies: Design and implement controllers in Matlab/Simulink
Auto-tune PI/PID controllers
Synthesize robust multivariable controllers using H-infinity and mu-synthesis
Apply linear matrix inequalities to controller design
Implement controllers for real-time operation

description_en: Introductory overview of modern medical imaging modalities, their principles, image quality, risks and required data processing.
competencies: Describe modalities of modern medical imaging
Explain principles of X-ray, CT, PET/SPECT, ultrasound and MRI
Assess image quality and patient risks of imaging methods
Outline data processing steps for medical images
Apply basic image processing in laboratory exercises

description_en: Fundamentals of embedded mechatronic systems covering analog and digital solutions, signal processing and real-time behaviour.
competencies: Explain structure and function of embedded systems in mechatronics
Design analog solutions based on operational amplifiers
Design digital solutions based on microcontrollers
Specify and generate real-time software
Implement functions on programmable logic

description_en: Controlled and regulated electrical drive systems with a focus on traction drives, covering structure, machine characteristics and speed control strategies.
competencies: Explain the structure and functions of electric drive systems
Select electrical drive systems for traction applications
Assess steady-state and dynamic drive characteristics
Analyse speed-torque behavior of electrical machines
Apply control strategies for variable-speed drives

description_en: Covers electromagnetic compatibility of regenerative electrical systems, including disturbance analysis, prediction methods and mitigation.
competencies: Describe generation, propagation and effects of electromagnetic disturbances in grids
Assess the impact of renewable sources on grid power quality
Select analytical and numerical methods to predict EMC
Apply shielding concepts and mitigation measures for EMC problems

description_en: Provides advanced knowledge of electrical machines and actuators as components of electromechanical and mechatronic systems.
competencies: Explain operation and dynamics of unconventional electrical machines
Model electromechanical actuators within mechanical systems
Design control for reluctance, stepper and linear motors
Project the integration of actuators into mechatronic systems

description_en: Advanced course on planning and operating electrical power grids, smart-grid development, grid security and integration of decentralized generation.
competencies: Plan and operate electrical power transmission and distribution grids
Derive measures to develop intelligent smart-grid structures
Assess grid security, dynamic security and black-out prevention
Integrate decentralized generators and model wind farms in grids

description_en: Construction, behaviour and control of electromechanical actuators such as piezo and magnetostrictive actuators and their system integration.
competencies: Model electromechanical systems using Lagrange equations
Explain construction and behaviour of piezo and magnetostrictive actuators
Design power amplifiers and control for piezo actuators
Integrate electric actuators into complex mechanical systems
Apply actuators to vibration damping and positioning

description_en: Teaches instruments, probes and standardized methods for measuring and assessing electromagnetic compatibility of electrical systems.
competencies: Use measurement instruments and probes for EMC assessment
Analyze measurement limits and errors in time and frequency domains
Select suitable measurement methods for EMC problems
Evaluate emission and immunity measurement results

description_en: A seminar applying electromagnetic compatibility measurement methods through experiments to analyze and evaluate EMC problems.
competencies: Apply EMC measurement methods to analyze EMC problems
Conduct EMC investigations in time and frequency domains
Measure scattering and transfer impedance matrices experimentally
Evaluate experimental EMC results critically

description_en: Course on analyzing electromagnetic compatibility of electronic systems using field theory, numerical methods and signal/power integrity.
competencies: Perform worst-case electromagnetic compatibility analyses of electronic systems
Select and quantitatively evaluate interference-suppression measures
Apply numerical electromagnetic field computation methods
Assess signal and power integrity in interconnect structures

description_en: Covers electrical machines and control of generator systems for renewable energy generation, including maximum power point tracking.
competencies: Assess boundary conditions of renewable energy generation
Dimension electrical machines for generator operation
Design control for maximum power point tracking
Optimize energy yield in variable-speed generator systems

description_en: Teaches the application and implementation of genetic and evolutionary algorithms for global optimization in engineering and biomedicine.
competencies: Apply genetic and evolutionary algorithms for global optimization
Select and implement suitable algorithm structures for a task
Design fitness functions and application-specific components
Validate optimization results in engineering and biomedical problems

description_en: Introduction to stochastic modelling of random processes in biophysical non-equilibrium systems, with analysis and numerical simulation.
competencies: Characterise properties of stochastic processes
Derive and approximate master equations via Fokker-Planck equations
Relate stochastic differential equations to Fokker-Planck descriptions
Simulate stochastic processes with the Gillespie algorithm
Model biophysical non-equilibrium systems stochastically

description_en: Teaches architecture, programming and integration of hardware accelerators like GPUs, FPGAs and AI accelerators into CPU-based systems.
competencies: Explain architectures of GPU, FPGA and AI accelerators
Select suitable accelerators for given applications
Design and implement parallel programs for heterogeneous systems
Evaluate performance, energy and scalability of heterogeneous systems

description_en: Covers analysis and dimensioning of high-frequency waveguide and transmission line structures using analytical electromagnetic methods.
competencies: Analyze high-frequency transmission line structures
Select and dimension waveguides for a given application
Solve Bessel differential equations for cylindrical structures
Apply tools to analyze complex line structures and discontinuities
